findings.evidence: `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean` defines `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE` at line 82, bottom inclusion lemmas at lines 310-336, and `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv` at lines 341-369; the new file imports only that module and starts the corresponding `H ≤ ⊤` map at line 51.
findings.fix: Move these declarations into `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean`, adjacent to the existing top-subgroup block after `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv_apply`/`_symm_apply`.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit` and the following top/regular lemmas are not in their canonical home; they extend `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient`, `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE`, and `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv` already defined in `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean`.

summary: The new API is placed in a separate file even though it is a direct top-subgroup extension of the existing subgroup fibre-orbit file. Move it to the canonical specialization section rather than adding another module.
